title: Global Export Markets
description: Mist & Ember Exports exports premium Sri Lankan tea to over 40 countries worldwide, building strong partnerships across Europe, Asia, and the Middle East.

title: Annual Production Capacity
description: Our facilities are equipped to produce over 2,500 metric tons of tea annually, maintaining consistency, quality, and timely delivery for global clients.

title: Experienced Tea Experts
description: Mist & Ember Exports’ expert blenders and tasters bring decades of experience, ensuring each batch of tea reflects Sri Lanka’s authentic aroma and taste.

title: International Certifications
subtext: Lion Logo, ISO, HACCP, GMP & Ozone Friendly
description: Certified for excellence — we uphold the highest standards in safety, authenticity, and environmental responsibility.

title: Sustainability Programs
description: From reforestation and renewable packaging to fair-trade initiatives, Mist & Ember Exports continues to invest in sustainable growth and local empowerment.

title: Customer Satisfaction Rate
description: Global distributors and private-label clients consistently rate our quality and reliability among the highest in the tea export industry.
